user.title: SunSight
user.description: Every source is optional — SunSight uses whatever you have. Leave a field empty to skip the sensors that depend on it.

data_description.window_lux_entity: A light sensor on the window frame, used to detect direct sun striking the glass.
data_description.window_azimuth_min: Start of the compass range over which the sun can reach this window (0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W).
data_description.window_azimuth_max: End of that range. A range may wrap through north.
data_description.window_lux_threshold: Illuminance above which direct sun is assumed. Set it between your diffuse daylight level and your direct-beam peaks.
data_description.irradiance_entity: A pyranometer or weather-station solar sensor in W/m². The most direct measure of sky clarity.
data_description.pv_power_entity: Total array power in kW. Used as a second, independent clear-sky signal.
data_description.pv_clip_kw: Peak output your system can produce. Readings at this level are treated as clipped rather than as an exact ratio.
data_description.rain_entity: Wet means direct sun is impossible, so it vetoes detection. An unavailable sensor never vetoes.
data_description.forecast_outlook_entity: A sensor whose state is a word like sunny or shower.
data_description.forecast_rain_chance_entity: Rain probability for today, as a percentage.
data_description.clear_threshold: Percentage of clear-sky potential above which the sky counts as clear.
data_description.min_elevation: Sun must be at least this high for fine weather to be reported, which skips dim twilight.
data_description.temperature_entity: Outdoor air temperature. Needed, with humidity, wind and pressure, for evapotranspiration.
data_description.wind_speed_entity: Wind speed. Evapotranspiration is sensitive to this, so prefer a station over a forecast.
data_description.pressure_entity: Station (absolute) pressure, not the sea-level adjusted figure.
data_description.wind_height_m: Height your anemometer is mounted at. Readings are corrected to the 2 m reference height.

init.title: SunSight options
init.description: Change any setting. Clearing an entity field disables the sensors that depend on it.
